name: ai-agent-engineering
description: The engineering team that BUILDS production LLM-agent systems — 2 agents (agentic-systems-architect, agent-implementation-engineer) deciding agent topology (single-agent/ReAct, planner/executor, multi-agent, workflow/graph like LangGraph), framework/runtime (provider-neutral), tool/function-call boundary & contracts, memory/context strategy, guardrails, cost/latency budgets, tracing, and the agent-eval harness (offline sets, LLM-as-judge, regression gates, red-team). 3 skills, a 2-doc knowledge bank, and 2 templates. Distinct from ai-rag-engineering (retrieval), prompt-engineering (prompt/context craft), and llm-evaluation-engineering (eval methodology) — this is the SYSTEMS layer that COMPOSES prompts, retrieval, tools, and evals into a running agent. LLM/framework/pricing specifics are volatile — retrieval date + verify-at-use. Needs ravenclaude-core.
